title: Secure your retirement
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Planning for retirement can...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Planning for retirement can be daunting, but with the right solutions you can ensure a comfortable and secure future.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Planning for retirement can be daunting, but with the right solutions you can ensure a comfortable and secure future."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"By providing a unique hybrid between life annuity and living annuity, you have the best of both worlds. Take a trusted Momentum client's word for it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Success storyMeet David, a 65-year-old retiree who was concerned about outliving his savings.","html":"Success story
Meet David, a 65-year-old retiree who was concerned about outliving his savings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He wanted the security of a guaranteed income but also desired the flexibility to manage his investments. After consulting with him, we decided to incorporate the Guaranteed Annuity Portfolio into his retirement plan.","html":"He wanted the security of a guaranteed income but also desired the flexibility to manage his investments. After consulting with him, we decided to incorporate the Guaranteed Annuity Portfolio into his retirement plan."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By allocating a portion of his living annuity to a life annuity portfolio, David now receives a steady, guaranteed income each month, covering his essential expenses.","html":"By allocating a portion of his living annuity to a life annuity portfolio, David now receives a steady, guaranteed income each month, covering his essential expenses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rest of his portfolio remains invested, giving him the potential for growth and the ability to adjust his investments as needed.","html":"The rest of his portfolio remains invested, giving him the potential for growth and the ability to adjust his investments as needed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This hybrid approach has given David the confidence and financial stability to enjoy his retirement without the constant worry of market volatility.","html":"This hybrid approach has given David the confidence and financial stability to enjoy his retirement without the constant worry of market volatility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here are some key benefits of incorporating a life annuity portfolio within your living annuity:","html":"Here are some key benefits of incorporating a life annuity portfolio within your living annuity:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guaranteed incomeEnjoy the peace of mind that comes with a guaranteed income for life, regardless of market fluctuations. This ensures your essential expenses are always covered.","html":"Guaranteed income
Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with a guaranteed income for life, regardless of market fluctuations. This ensures your essential expenses are always covered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FlexibilityWhile you have the security of a guaranteed income, you also retain the flexibility to manage the rest of your living annuity portfolio according to your needs and market conditions.","html":"Flexibility
While you have the security of a guaranteed income, you also retain the flexibility to manage the rest of your living annuity portfolio according to your needs and market conditions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Inflation protectionThe guaranteed income can be structured to increase with inflation, helping you maintain your purchasing power throughout retirement.","html":"Inflation protection
The guaranteed income can be structured to increase with inflation, helping you maintain your purchasing power throughout retirement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Legacy planningWith a living annuity, you can leave a legacy for your loved ones. The remaining balance in your portfolio can be passed on to your beneficiaries.","html":"Legacy planning
With a living annuity, you can leave a legacy for your loved ones. The remaining balance in your portfolio can be passed on to your beneficiaries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DiversificationCombining a life annuity with a living annuity allows for a diversified approach to retirement planning, balancing security with growth potential.","html":"Diversification
Combining a life annuity with a living annuity allows for a diversified approach to retirement planning, balancing security with growth potential."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Don't wait until it's too late. Secure your retirement today with Momentum's Guaranteed Annuity Portfolio. Contact Hein Slabbert (061 580 3673) now for a personalised consultation and take the first step towards a worry-free future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Click through: https://mconnect.momentum.co.za/hein_slabbert/7C8E37","html":"Click through: https://mconnect.momentum.co.za/hein_slabbert/7C8E37"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
